spec_match.rationale: Probes for TCPSocket and UDPSocket constructors and attempts to open a connection on the live page — the chromestatus surface for direct-sockets-api.

interactive.rationale: Real attempt-button that exercises the API and shows the rejection reason; honest degradation outside an IWA.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises probe + attempted call with exact rejection visible; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't enumerate the permissions-policy gate, only the constructor surface. Doesn't show what happens on insecure context.

openQuestions.title: Enumerate all preconditions
openQuestions.detail: Pair the constructor probe with secure-context check, IWA scheme check, and permissions-policy probe — same pattern as capture-all-screens/policy-probe. Visitors debugging a deployment need every gate listed.

openQuestions.title: Show the NotAllowedError vs SecurityError distinction
openQuestions.detail: Different gates fail with different error names. Log the error.name explicitly so visitors know which precondition tripped.

summary: Honest probe-and-attempt for the API. Could enumerate every precondition gate the way the capture-all-screens policy-probe does.
